behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all three files (Gallery.svelte, Index.svelte, types.ts), the height prop, style:height binding, upload wrapper, and CSS class mismatch — all test targets are discoverable.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes symptoms (class mismatch, string heights dropped, px suffix corruption) without specifying exact class names to use or code replacements.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavior (string preservation, type includes 'string', CSS class consistency, wrapper has height/flex rule) rather than exact class names or line positions, allowing alternative valid fixes.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests extract and evaluate Svelte expressions via Node subprocess (_node_eval) executing the style:height logic with different inputs, not just text grep.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests like test_string_height_preserved execute the expression with '300px' and require exact equality; a stub cannot satisfy this without the actual fix logic.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All three expected behaviors (CSS applies, string heights respected, upload wrapper fills height) are covered by test_css_class_consistency, test_string_height_preserved/forwarding/type, and test_upload_wrapper_height.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are clearly grouped with section comment headers (fail_to_pass, pass_to_pass, repo_tests) and descriptive docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a frontend CSS/Svelte fix, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths (js/gallery/shared/Gallery.svelte, Index.svelte, types.ts) are consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to the general files to investigate but doesn't name the specific buggy class name or exact lines; localization of which class name is wrong remains agent work.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code-only task, not agentmd-edits.
